context: Tests whether the agent selects the small low-risk tier for a tiny documentation-only change, uses separate general and comments reviewers without irrelevant persona fanout, produces a valid verdict, and does not inflate documentation corrections into defects.

checklist.name: Small tier selected
checklist.description: The report treats this two-file documentation-only change as the small low-risk tier rather than a normal or high-risk review

checklist.name: General persona used
checklist.description: The report includes the general reviewer persona (or equivalent broad code review lens)

checklist.name: Comments persona used
checklist.description: The report includes the comments reviewer persona (or equivalent documentation/docstring lens) — appropriate given docstring change

checklist.name: Irrelevant personas omitted
checklist.description: The report does not spawn tests, silent-failures, code-shape, types, or cleanup reviewers for this documentation-only change

checklist.name: Verdict present
checklist.description: The report contains exactly one verdict label: 'ship it', 'needs review', or 'blocked'

checklist.name: Separate reviewers evidenced
checklist.description: The report shows that general and comments were separate reviewer subagents rather than one blended persona pass

checklist.name: No nit inflation
checklist.description: The report does NOT flag the parameter rename (amount → value) as a defect or high-severity finding — the JSDoc now correctly matches the actual parameter name

checklist.name: Docstring accuracy noted
checklist.description: The report identifies that the @param name was corrected from 'amount' to 'value' to match the actual function signature — and treats this as an accuracy improvement, not a bug

checklist.name: Unverified areas or residual risk
checklist.description: The report mentions any residual risk or unverified surfaces, OR explicitly states there are none (either outcome is acceptable — silence is not)

checklist.name: Recommended follow-up
checklist.description: The report includes a recommended follow-up action such as implementation, runtime verification, readiness setup, documentation cleanup, or none

checklist.name: Compact verdict block
checklist.description: The report stays concise: findings, if any, are not repeated in the verdict footer, and the final metadata uses no more than 4 labeled lines with no scope/persona noise unless needed
